results.title: Spain End France’s World Cup Dream with 2-0 Semifinal Masterclass in Dallas
results.description: Spain defeated France 2-0 in the 2026 World Cup semifinal in Dallas on Tuesday, with Oyarzabal scoring a penalty and Porro adding a second-half goal. Mbappe failed to register a shot on target as Spain booked their place in the final with a sixth consecutive clean sheet.

results.title: Lamine Yamal handball controversy: Why Spain's penalty vs France was allowed
results.description: Spain has reached the FIFA World Cup final after defeating France 2-0 in Tuesday's semi-final, but one of the biggest talking points was a first-half penalty award by Salvadoran referee Ivan Barton. Mikel Oyarzabal and Pedro Porro scored goals for Spain against France.

results.title: FULL LIST: Unai Simón joins World Cup clean-sheet greats as Barthez, Shilton remain joint leaders
results.description: Spain’s Unai Simón climbs to third on FIFA’s all-time World Cup clean sheets list, matching legends like Courtois and Lloris.
